title.en: Ye Tian came to the Void Ancient Snake.

content.en:
The second supreme legendary-level creature that Ye Tian wanted to kill was called the Void Ancient Snake, and his cultivation was also in the late stage of the legendary-level, but his strength was slightly stronger than that of the dragon monkey.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Void Ancient Snake.

At this time, the Void Ancient Serpent was sleeping in its lair.

The Void Ancient Serpent's body was very large, and it had countless transparent scales on its body, and these revealed scales emitted a strange light and contained terrifying defensive power.

Moreover, each scale contains many voids, and the scales that attack it will be offset by layers of voids.

Therefore, the strongest part of the Void Ancient Serpent is defense and life-saving.

When Ye Tian descended here, the slightest wave caused by it attracted the attention of this Void Ancient Snake.

Rumble!

The legendary-level creature Void Ancient Snake opened its eyes and locked on to Ye Tian.

Suddenly, it was furious.

In an instant, the attack of the Void Ancient Serpent descended.

Many space-time and space were shattered one after another, and the nodes of countless space-time compression were the positions where Ye Tian stood.

It wanted to kill Ye Tian in one fell swoop.

However, compared with Ye Tian's strength, there is still a lot of gap.

"Broken!"

Ye Tian's second sequence of supreme rules shattered these many time and space, and immediately punched the body of the Void Ancient Snake.

Many of the Void scales on its body were shattered one by one, and even after many Void Reductions, it was still useless.

Poof!

Ye Tian's punch directly pierced the opponent's body, and then a series of attacks descended, shattering his body violently.

Void Ancient Serpent, Fall!

"The second blood of the Legend of the Strongest is here!"

Ye Tian put away the corpse of the Void Ancient Snake, and then left.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to attack and kill one by one the strongest legendary-level creatures, killing six of them, and then he was ready to send these six corpses out.

After all, if it was discovered by that legendary creature that rivaled the top patriarch, it would be a failure.

......

Legend has it that the river abyss exits.

Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape Replica Body successfully came out of it.

Then, he handed over the corpses of the six Legendary Creatures to his real replica body, and then quickly sent them back to the Winter Night Fortress.

Of course.

Ye Tian's 10,000-blooded golden ape copied his body and returned to the legendary river abyss.

With only six copies of the blood of the strongest legend, he naturally couldn't look down on it, so he needed more blood of the legend.

Other than that.

He will also kill more top-level Legendary creatures and ordinary Legendary creatures by the way, and collect a large amount of top-level Legendary Blood as well as Normal Legendary Blood.

"In the incomparably ancient years, it must have been very easy for the Innate Origin Alliance to collect the blood of top-level legends and ordinary legends, but after the birth of that terrifying legendary-level creature in the legend abyss, it became difficult!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The years passed.

Ye Tian naturally collected more and more legendary blood, and the human race did not need to worry about the legendary blood in the future.

However, just when Ye Tian killed twenty-nine supreme legendary-level creatures and sent them out, he was about to continue killing supreme legendary-level creatures, a terrifying aura of despair descended.

Rumble!!!!

Near the body of the 10,000-blooded golden ape, a terrifying golden crow appeared, staring at Ye Tian with a pair of golden eyes.

【Legend of Guwu】

The aura of the other party was too terrifying, far beyond the average patriarch.

Moreover, he couldn't move anymore and was directly locked.

"Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape, you have killed so many legendary-level creatures in these years, and you have also sent out the legendary river abyss. Moreover, you are not a legendary creature of the legendary river abyss, you must be the pet of those hateful guys in the outside world, as a legendary creature, but you take refuge in those guys, you should be damned!"

Followed by.

Ye Tian's duplicate body burned, turning into ashes in an instant.

......

Legend has it that outside the river abyss.

Ye Tian frowned slightly: "It's a pity that it was discovered." Moreover, it has attracted the attention of the legendary Guwu, and even if you copy other legendary-level creatures and sneak in, you will be discovered. Forget it, it's time to go!"

Ye Tian returned to the Winter Night Fortress.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian specialized in cultivating the body of the Legend of the Supreme Lizard, and after a long time, he successfully cultivated the body of the Legend of the Ancient Lizard to the realm of perfection, and began to cultivate the body of the seventh gate of the Legend of the Supreme Legend.

Next, he cultivated more Supreme Legendary Bodies to see how many Supreme Legendary Bodies he could cultivate.

Human domain.

Terran Temple.

At this time.

The Terran Temple was very lively, and Ye Tian brought a lot of legendary blood here to exchange it for the Terran powerhouse.

It's just that the requirements for wanting to exchange are very high, and there are very few Ninefold Dao realms of the human race.

this day.

A new genius of the Terran Race, Ye Wuxian came to the Terran Temple.

Ye Wuxian is a descendant of Ye Xingchen, belonging to a descendant of I don't know how many generations, but his talent is very high, he has been cultivated by Ye Xingchen, and now his cultivation has also reached the peak of the Nine Folds Dao Realm.

However, he is just taking the ordinary road, and he does not have the foundation to take the path of the strongest to the road.

Now, he's amassed enough contribution points to redeem Fourth Sequence Supreme Rule items and a piece of Legendary Blood.

Soon.

He was able to redeem it.

After that, Ye Wuxian went to retreat and cultivate.

After a period of time, Ye Wuxian comprehended the rules of the Fourth Sequence of the Supreme Dao, and successfully broke through to the Legendary Dao Realm.

In the years that followed, there were more and more legends of the human race to the Dao realm, although they were all ordinary legends to the Dao realm, but their number increased too quickly.

You must know that forces such as the Su Clan, the Sword Clan, the Qin Clan, etc., have accumulated so many legends to the Dao Realm after countless years and through an unknown number of trillions of Dao eras!

And the human race has given birth to so many legends to the Dao realm in a short period of time, and when the news came out, other forces were envious.

Deep in the human domain.

In a majestic palace.

Ye Tian and his wife all live here.

this day.

Ye Xingchen came to see his father Ye Tian.

"Father, the Terrans have now given birth to twenty Legendary Dao Realms, shouldn't we put the resources suitable for the Legendary Dao Realm in the Terran Sanctuary and let them exchange them?" Ye Xingchen asked.

"We really need to put those resources in the Terran Temple!"

Ye Tian casually took out a bunch of resources and handed them to Ye Xingchen.

"Xingchen, you just put these resources in the Terran Temple, remember, you still need a high enough contribution value to be exchanged, you can't give it for nothing!" Ye Tian advised.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen responded.

Not long after Ye Xingchen left, Ye Tian suddenly received a summons from Su Yuan.

"Elder Su Yuan came to me and asked me to go to the headquarters of the Innate Origin Alliance?"

Ye Tian immediately let one of his duplicate bodies pass.

It should be a big deal, otherwise he wouldn't have been allowed to go to the headquarters of the Innate Origin Alliance in person.
